title: 10 Herbal Creams For Leg Cramps
description: Lavandula angustifolia creams contains linalool, linalyl acetate, and camphor, which are the key bioactive constituents responsible for its therapeutic effects. These compounds have a calming effect on the muscles, which can help to relieve leg cramps caused by muscle spasms. Linalool, in particular, has a relaxing effect on the nervous system, while linalyl acetate helps to reduce inflammation and improve blood flow.
